semantics.effectiveSequence: Approved documents only, ordered by publication date with base before SIN on ties.
semantics.proposedDocuments: Retained as historical evidence and excluded from the normative effective sequence.
semantics.laterSpecifications: Successor WAP 2.0 material is delta evidence and cannot override strict WAP 1.2.1 behavior.

families.title: Wireless Application Protocol Architecture
families.interpretationRule: Start with each approved base and apply approved SINs in effectiveSequence order. A SIN changes only the identified text unless it explicitly supplies a replacement.

scrExtraction.note: SCR tables and SIN changes require line-item extraction; this graph establishes source precedence only.

families.title: Binary XML Content Format
families.interpretationRule: Start with each approved base and apply approved SINs in effectiveSequence order. A SIN changes only the identified text unless it explicitly supplies a replacement.

scrExtraction.note: WAP-192_105 corrects the actor-specific WBXML 1.3 SCR and restores omitted WAP-192.101 changes. The selected Class C client applies WBXML:MCF to the three effective mandatory client rows.

families.title: Wireless Control Message Protocol
families.interpretationRule: Start with each approved base and apply approved SINs in effectiveSequence order. A SIN changes only the identified text unless it explicitly supplies a replacement.

scrExtraction.note: The effective actor-specific SCR is source-extracted with exact dependency expressions. The selected Class C transport path resolves WDP through CDPD-shaped UDP/IPv4, WCMP through the general message structure, and WSP through the connectionless mode; connection-oriented WSP and WTP remain conditional.

families.title: Wireless Markup Language 1.3
families.interpretationRule: Start with each approved base and apply approved SINs in effectiveSequence order. A SIN changes only the identified text unless it explicitly supplies a replacement.

scrExtraction.note: All 76 effective WML 1.3 SCR rows are source-extracted and mapped to work items. The mandatory implementation audit records 2 implemented, 23 partial, and 22 missing rows, with direct tests linked to 25 rows. WAP-215 CCR-CLASSC-C-001 selects the 39 mandatory WML user-agent rows for the Class C client profile.
